h3: Find out about eTAs and if you can apply
What to do after you apply
Dual Canadian citizens need a Canadian passport

sections.heading: Most requested
bullets: Find out what you need to travel to Canada
I’m visiting the US and want to visit Canada. Do I need an eTA?

sections.heading: Find out about eTAs and if you can apply
items: العربية , 廣東話(繁體字) , 普通話(繁體字) , Български , English, Español , Filipino, Français , Deutsch , Ελληνικά , Magyarul , Italiano , 日本語 , 한국어 , Polski , Português , Português (Brasil) , ภาษาไทย

sections.heading: Apply online for an eTA
items: To apply, you must have a valid passport, a credit or a debit card and an email address, and you must answer a few questions in the online application.

sections.heading: What to do after you apply
items: What to expect if we need more details from you, and things to keep in mind after you receive an eTA

sections.heading: Dual Canadian citizens need a Canadian passport
items: How to apply for a passport, and why you need a passport and not an eTA for travel to or through Canada

sections.heading: Check your eTA status
items: Get online updates on pending applications as well as information on the status of your current eTA

sections.heading: eTA top questions
items: Answers to common issues when you apply for an eTA

sections.heading: Flying to Canada?
items: Find out how easy it is to apply online. Learn how to get your eTA before you book your flight to Canada.
